ACKS-LIB.Title: ACKS II — Library
ACKS-LIB.mount.notOwner: You need ownership of both the rider and the mount.
ACKS-LIB.mount.notMountable: {name} is not marked as mountable — allowed anyway, but check with your Judge.
ACKS-LIB.group.dropPrototype: Drop a monster, character, or animal actor here to set what every member is a copy of.
ACKS-LIB.group.pristineHint: Living bodies that have no record yet — they gain one the moment they are deployed, wounded, or named.
ACKS-LIB.group.rosterEmpty: No members individuated yet — the whole group is still uniform.
ACKS-LIB.group.warn.invariant: This group has more living records than its headcount — a hand-edit left it inconsistent. Raise the living count or remove records.
ACKS-LIB.group.warn.noScene: Open a scene to deploy onto.
ACKS-LIB.group.warn.noPristine: Every living member is already individuated.
ACKS-LIB.group.warn.noBodies: No living bodies left to lose.
ACKS-LIB.group.warn.badPrototype: A group's prototype must be an ordinary actor, not another group.
ACKS-LIB.group.info.detached: {name} left the group as a standalone actor.
